headline: Edinburgh's most awarded garden designers, grown from the ground up
subheadline: From private estates to urban courtyards — we craft living spaces that breathe.
about_text: Verdant Landscapes has shaped Edinburgh's finest outdoor spaces for over 15 years. We blend naturalistic design with low-maintenance planting tailored to Scotland's climate — every project is built to look better with every passing season.

services.title: Garden Design & Master Planning
services.description: Bespoke design packages from initial site survey through full planting plans, hard landscaping specs, and hands-on installation management.

services.title: Hard Landscaping
services.description: Patios, retaining walls, pathways and decking built using ethically sourced Scottish stone and certified reclaimed timber.

services.title: Planting & Soft Landscaping
services.description: Climate-matched planting schemes that thrive year-round in Edinburgh's coastal microclimate with minimal intervention.

services.title: Seasonal Maintenance
services.description: Tailored care programs — from spring preparation to winter protection — keeping your garden performing beautifully every month.

reviews.name: Fiona M.
reviews.quote: Verdant completely transformed our Victorian walled garden. The planting is stunning and it genuinely improves every season.

reviews.name: The Caledonian Hotel
reviews.quote: Our courtyard has become a true destination since the redesign. Guests mention it constantly — it's become part of our identity.

reviews.name: James & Alison R.
reviews.quote: Professional from first consultation to final planting. They listened carefully, understood the brief, and delivered well beyond it.

faqs.question: What is your minimum project size?
faqs.answer: We typically work on projects from £8,000 upward, covering design fees and implementation. We're happy to discuss scope during your free initial consultation.

faqs.question: Do you manage planning permission for structures?
faqs.answer: Yes — we handle all permitted development and planning applications for pergolas, boundary structures and outbuildings as part of a full design contract.

faqs.question: How long does a garden transformation take?
faqs.answer: A typical residential redesign runs 8–16 weeks from sign-off to completion depending on scale. You'll receive a phased timeline before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are your materials sustainably sourced?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use peat-free growing media throughout and source stone, timber and aggregates from certified Scottish and UK suppliers wherever possible.

service_area_text: Designing across Edinburgh, East Lothian, Midlothian, the Borders and Fife.
differentiators: RHS-qualified designers with 15+ years of Scottish garden expertise
Public liability insured to £5 million on every project
Dedicated project manager from brief to handover
Peat-free planting and sustainably sourced materials throughout
trust_proof: Winner — BALI Scottish Garden of the Year 2023
Recommended by the Edinburgh Architectural Association

metadata.title: Verdant Landscapes | Premium Garden Design Edinburgh
metadata.description: Award-winning garden design and landscaping across Edinburgh and Scotland. Bespoke, sustainable, and built to last.
